this file will be rewritten in
ours, and its contents will be
duplicated in another file.
but it will not be eligible for
rename detection.

note that it has also been edited
in the theirs branch

duplicated in another file.
but it will not be eligible for
rename detection.

but it will not be eligible for
rename detection.
